name_en: Instantly smitten Twilly|||In stock [Laughing], I really like it. I was amazed the moment I saw it. The colors are varied but not messy. The owl is the perfect finishing touch [Thumbs up]. The whole scarf is full of vitality, especially suitable for autumn and winter~ Paired with elephant gray or solid colors, it is absolutely stunning.
